{"type": "output", "task": "sparql-qa", "output": {"sparql": "PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT(MONTH(?birthDate) AS ?birthMonth) WHERE {
  wd:Q12107 wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 2011)
  wd:Q12107 wdt:P1215 ?stage .
  ?stage rdfs:label "Stage 1" @en .
  ?stage wdt:P162 ?rider .
  ?rider wdt:P1546 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P571 ?establishmentDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?establishmentDate) = 2000)
  ?rider wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
}", "kg": "wikidata", "selections": "", "result": "Got no rows and 1 columns", "endpoint": "https://qlever.dev/api/wikidata", "type": "answer", "answer": "No answer provided", "formatted": "No answer provided

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT(MONTH(?birthDate) AS ?birthMonth) WHERE {
  wd:Q12107 wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 2011)
  wd:Q12107 wdt:P1215 ?stage .
  ?stage rdfs:label "Stage 1" @en .
  ?stage wdt:P162 ?rider .
  ?rider wdt:P1546 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P571 ?establishmentDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?establishmentDate) = 2000)
  ?rider wdt:P569 ?birthDate .
}
```
